data.content: The project uses **MSTest v3.8.0** with the newer Microsoft Testing Platform (`TestingPlatformDotnetTestSupport`). Tests are categorized via `[TestCategory]`. Let me run just the Integration tests:

toolRequests.name: bash

arguments.description: Run integration tests with MSTest category filter

toolRequests.intentionSummary: Run integration tests with MSTest category filter

data.reasoningText:
The project uses **MSTest** (v3.8.0) as the test framework. The `Directory.Build.props` enables `TestingPlatformDotnetTestSupport`, which means it uses the newer Microsoft Testing Platform integration with `dotnet test`.

The tests have `TestCategory` attributes — "Unit" and "Integration". The user wants to run only the integration tests. With MSTest and `dotnet test`, I can filter by category using `--filter "TestCategory=Integration"`.

arguments.description: Run integration tests with MSTest category filter

toolCalls.name: bash
toolCalls.args: {"command": "cd /tmp/sv-5d7b421e6cfd4b62837d962c2b233ce7 && dotnet test --filter \"TestCategory=Integration\" 2>&1", "description": "Run integration tests with MSTest category filter", "initial_wait": 60}

toolArgs.description: Run integration tests with MSTest category filter
